user_prompt: fix any mistakes related to this invokation highlighted in the IDE
agent_reply: The issue was that `Clock.syncToCompileTime()` was called before `M5.begin(cfg)`, so the M5 RTC object may not have been initialized yet. I also added the missing `ClockAgent.h` include.
